openSourceAssets.creator: Kenney
openSourceAssets.use: Generic broadleaf silhouette for the Gangetic plain; not presented as a specific botanical reconstruction.

generatedAssets.historicalNote: An original low-poly storage vessel inspired by broad ancient South Asian ceramic forms. It does not reproduce a specific museum object or claim an exact Nanda-period typology.

futureTargets.reason: CC0 castle kits use European stone crenellations unlike Pataliputra's evidenced timber defenses.
Available CC0 weapon packs are visibly European and are suitable only as temporary animation placeholders.
CC0 humanoids provide useful rigs and animations but not historically responsible Indian clothing silhouettes.
